# Patient Monitor Product Card Template

## Purpose

Defines the ideal CyberMedica card for patient monitors and monitoring systems.

## Required Sections

- Identity: manufacturer, model, variant, registration number, status, country.
- Classification: bedside/transport/central monitoring, patient group.
- Documents: RU, IFU/user manual, datasheet, module compatibility guide.
- Monitoring parameters: ECG, SpO2, NIBP, IBP, temperature, EtCO2 and others.
- Display: size, resolution, touch, waveform support.
- Alarms: alarm categories, visual/audio alarm data.
- Connectivity: central station, network, data export, protocols.
- Modules/accessories: compatible modules, sensors, cables.
- Electrical/physical: power, battery, dimensions, weight.
- Maintenance/service: calibration, service intervals, cleaning.
- Procurement notes: modules and accessories to specify.
- Evidence: source documents and locators.

## Critical Fields

- measured parameters;
- module compatibility;
- alarm capability;
- patient group;
- battery/runtime;
- connectivity.

## Safety

Do not publish measured-parameter support or module compatibility without
official evidence and reviewer approval.
